ogTitle: Clara Creek vs Claraville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clara Creek and Claraville.
heading: Clara Creek vs Claraville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clara Creek, Queensland and Claraville, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clara Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Claraville (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clara Creek or Claraville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clara Creek has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Claraville scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clara Creek scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Claraville scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clara Creek or Claraville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clara Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
